name: Enamor
descrip: Sweetly seduce your opponent with just your words. Can charm. Is a Foreplay skill.
outcome: [AttackerName] whispers sensually and passionately to [TargetName], captivating [TargetHimOrHer] with seductive sexual promises that leave [TargetHimOrHer] flushing profusely.
miss: [AttackerName] whispers sensually and passionately to [TargetName], trying to captivate [TargetHimOrHer] with seductive sexual promises, but [TargetHeOrShe] appears to be unaffected.
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind is filled with sexual fantasies from [AttackerName]'s words. [TargetName] has been charmed!
